name: Conquest Reforged
short_description: A Casual Board-style Strategy game with a colorful pixel art Fantasy theme! Deploy units using your available energy, march them across the board and attempt to deal enough damage to your opponent's base to win!
detailed_description:
Welcome to Conquest Reforged!

What is Conquest Reforged you ask? It's a Casual Board-style Strategy game with a colorful pixel art Fantasy theme!

The objective is simple: Deploy units using your available energy, march them across the board and attempt to deal enough damage to your opponent's base to win!

Take advantage of the various unit traits and terrain types in order to execute a winning strategy!

Features:
  • 8 factions to choose from
  • Customizable Rules of Engagement
  • 6 preset maps, each with a handful of customizable tiles
  • A "Completely Custom" map where every tile can be customized, enabling you to create maps of your very own!
  • An in-game Guide which provides an overview of how to play, as well as references for Traits and Tile Types
  • Coming Soon: Single Player Campaign

**Please Note**
The Multiplayer in this game is Local Multiplayer, which can be played "Hot-Seat" style on the same device, or by using Steam Remote Play Together to share your game instance. Only the Host needs to own a copy to invite others to play with them!
